files.00_Overview.md: Add Learning Objectives section, Prerequisites (basic C++ knowledge), and Key Takeaways summary. Add 3W Framework: What (Code Anatomy fundamentals), Why (Benefits of reading source), How (Tools and workflow). Missing: Practical exercise section.
files.01_icoFoam_Walkthrough.md: Has good 3W coverage. Missing: explicit Learning Objectives at start, Prerequisites section, Key Takeaways summary, and Hands-on Exercise. Add practical exercise: 'Modify icoFoam to print residuals at each iteration'. Add 'Common Errors' section for typical mistakes.
files.02_simpleFoam_Walkthrough.md: Redundant with icoFoam: pressure-velocity coupling explanation overlaps significantly. Missing: Learning Objectives, Prerequisites, Key Takeaways, and Hands-on Exercise. Should focus more on differences from icoFoam rather than re-explaining PISO. Add exercise: 'Compare convergence with different relaxation factors'.
files.03_kEpsilon_Model_Anatomy.md: Excellent mathematical derivation (strength). Missing: Learning Objectives section, Prerequisites (RANS basics knowledge), Key Takeaways summary. Add 'Implementation Mapping' section linking each equation term to specific code lines. Add Hands-on Exercise: 'Add output of turbulent viscosity field'.
files.04_fvMatrix_Deep_Dive.md: Good technical depth. Missing: Learning Objectives, Prerequisites (FVM basics), Key Takeaways, and Hands-on Exercise. No practical exercise section. Add 'Memory Analysis' exercise: 'Profile matrix assembly for different mesh sizes'. Add 'Performance Tips' section.

global_strategy: Apply 3W Framework consistently: Add 'Learning Objectives' and 'Prerequisites' to ALL files at the start, and 'Key Takeaways' + 'Hands-on Exercise' at the end. Reduce redundancy: 02_simpleFoam should reference 01_icoFoam for shared concepts and focus only on SIMPLE-specific differences (under-relaxation, steady-state pseudo-time, turbulence). Add 'Related Files' cross-references between documents. Standardize structure: Overview → Prerequisites → Learning Objectives → Core Content → Key Takeaways → Hands-On Exercise → Next Steps. Ensure all code snippets have compile_commands.json setup mentioned in Overview. Add difficulty indicators (Beginner/Intermediate/Advanced) to each file.
